title: lycianthes bigeminata subsp. kaitisis
intro: Lycianthes bigeminata subsp. kaitisis, also known as kaitīsis, is a plant species within the Solanaceae family, native to New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of kaitīsis include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, kaitīsis is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
